title: agropyron repens var. arvense
intro: Agropyron repens var. arvense, commonly known as false brome or creeping brome, is a perennial grass species that is native to Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Agropyron repens var. arvense include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
